overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a foggy desert highway at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features rocky cliffs on the left, Joshua trees on the right, and streetlights cutting through the haze as vehicles pass by on the road.

passing the yellow sports car parked on the road shoulder
road begins curving to the left around the rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the desert highway, approaching and passing a parked yellow vehicle

entered.detail: bright yellow sports car parked on the road shoulder with headlights illuminated
tall rocky cliff formation running parallel to the left side of the road
tall utility pole with overhead light illuminating the foggy road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy desert highway at night, with a yellow sports car parked ahead on the shoulder. Two pedestrians stand near the vehicle as the camera approaches. The camera passes the car and continues along the curve of the road, with a rocky cliff face on the left and streetlights cutting through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved desert highway with guard rail

events.description: oncoming vehicle passes by on the left side of the road
second vehicle passes in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved highway, following the bend of the road

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: distinctive desert tree with spiky branches silhouetted against the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera rounds the curve of the highway, leaving the yellow car behind. The road is bordered by a guard rail on the right and the rocky cliff on the left. Joshua trees begin to appear on the right side as the camera continues through the foggy night, with occasional vehicles passing in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight desert highway section with Joshua trees

events.description: blue truck passes by on the left heading in the opposite direction
white vehicle passes on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the straight section of highway

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving past in the opposite lane

segments.scene_description: The highway straightens out, with Joshua trees now prominent on the right side. The camera continues walking along the shoulder, passing multiple vehicles traveling in the opposite direction. The fog persists, with streetlights creating pools of light along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding desert highway with dense fog

events.description: oncoming vehicle headlights appear in the distance through the fog
passing a vehicle on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding road as it curves gently through the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the foggy desert highway as the road winds gently. The guard rail disappears, leaving open desert on the right. The rocky cliff remains a constant presence on the left, while Joshua trees recede into the foggy distance. Vehicles continue to pass occasionally, their headlights cutting through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a foggy desert highway at night, moving from a roadside encounter toward an open, desolate landscape. It begins by approaching a yellow sports car and two pedestrians parked on the shoulder, passing them as the camera follows a curve bordered by a towering rocky cliff. As the road rounds the bend, the scene shifts to include a guard rail and the first appearance of Joshua trees on the right, while oncoming vehicles cut through the haze. The highway then straightens out, with the camera walking past multiple passing cars under the rhythmic glow of streetlights that create pools of light in the persistent fog. Finally, the road winds gently as the guard rail disappears into the open desert, leaving the rocky cliff as a constant presence on the left while the Joshua trees recede into the misty distance.
